name: Overworld
description: The wild land outside the safety of Oakhaven's walls.

Oakhaven_village_entrance.name: Oakhaven Gates
Oakhaven_village_entrance.description: The massive wooden gates of Oakhaven stand open to the north, offering safety from the wild.
Oakhaven_village_entrance.discovery_text: You see the great gates of Oakhaven rising before you.
Oakhaven_village_entrance.ambient_text: A guard nods at you from the gatehouse.

forest_edge_10.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_10.description: The sound of the open plains fades as the forest thickens. Ancient trees loom overhead.
forest_edge_10.discovery_text: A cool breeze carries the scent of pine and wildflowers from deeper within.
forest_edge_10.ambient_text: Birds call to each other from the branches above.

forest_edge_11.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_11.description: Wild strawberries grow among the roots of the old oaks here. The air smells of earth and green things.
forest_edge_11.discovery_text: The edge of the forest stretches out before you. Birds scatter as you approach.
forest_edge_11.ambient_text: A squirrel chatters from a nearby branch.

forest_edge_12.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_12.description: The tree line creates a natural boundary here. Birds flit between the branches, chirping softly.
forest_edge_12.discovery_text: The edge of the forest stretches out before you. Birds scatter as you approach.
forest_edge_12.ambient_text: A squirrel chatters from a nearby branch.

forest_edge_13.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_13.description: Tall oaks stand at the border between field and forest. A carpet of fallen leaves rustles underfoot.
forest_edge_13.discovery_text: A cool breeze carries the scent of pine and wildflowers from deeper within.
forest_edge_13.ambient_text: The wind carries the distant sound of a creek.

forest_edge_14.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_14.description: Wild strawberries grow among the roots of the old oaks here. The air smells of earth and green things.
forest_edge_14.discovery_text: The edge of the forest stretches out before you. Birds scatter as you approach.
forest_edge_14.ambient_text: A woodpecker taps somewhere in the distance.

forest_edge_17.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_17.description: A narrow deer trail winds through the undergrowth at the forest's edge.
forest_edge_17.discovery_text: The trees close in around you as you leave the open fields behind.
forest_edge_17.ambient_text: A squirrel chatters from a nearby branch.

forest_edge_18.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_18.description: The forest whispers at the edge of the plains. Wild roses and brambles tangle among the trunks.
forest_edge_18.discovery_text: You step past the last of the plains grass and into the shade of the forest.
forest_edge_18.ambient_text: Birds call to each other from the branches above.

forest_edge_24.name: Forest Edge
forest_edge_24.description: The sound of the open plains fades as the forest thickens. Ancient trees loom overhead.
forest_edge_24.discovery_text: A cool breeze carries the scent of pine and wildflowers from deeper within.
forest_edge_24.ambient_text: Birds call to each other from the branches above.

deep_forest_18.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_18.description: The canopy blots out much of the sky. Dappled light falls on a bed of moss and fallen leaves.
deep_forest_18.discovery_text: A carpet of bluebells stretches between the trees, glowing faintly in the dim light.
deep_forest_18.ambient_text: The creak of ancient branches swaying in the wind.

deep_forest_19.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_19.description: Massive trunks rise like pillars in a natural cathedral. Sunlight streams through gaps in the leaves.
deep_forest_19.discovery_text: The shadows deepen as you venture further from the forest's edge.
deep_forest_19.ambient_text: The creak of ancient branches swaying in the wind.

deep_forest_20.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_20.description: The forest floor is soft with decaying leaves. The air is cool and damp.
deep_forest_20.discovery_text: A carpet of bluebells stretches between the trees, glowing faintly in the dim light.
deep_forest_20.ambient_text: Leaves rustle as something moves in the undergrowth.

deep_forest_21.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_21.description: A fallen giant of a tree lies rotting, providing nutrients for new growth.
deep_forest_21.discovery_text: A carpet of bluebells stretches between the trees, glowing faintly in the dim light.
deep_forest_21.ambient_text: A woodpecker drums rhythmically on a distant trunk.

deep_forest_29.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_29.description: Twisted roots break through the soil, creating natural steps and obstacles.
deep_forest_29.discovery_text: A carpet of bluebells stretches between the trees, glowing faintly in the dim light.
deep_forest_29.ambient_text: The buzzing of insects creates a constant low hum.

deep_forest_30.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_30.description: The undergrowth is thick here—ferns, ivy, and low-hanging branches create a maze of green.
deep_forest_30.discovery_text: You push through a wall of ferns and find yourself deeper in the woods.
deep_forest_30.ambient_text: Leaves rustle as something moves in the undergrowth.

deep_forest_31.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_31.description: A fallen giant of a tree lies rotting, providing nutrients for new growth.
deep_forest_31.discovery_text: You push through a wall of ferns and find yourself deeper in the woods.
deep_forest_31.ambient_text: The creak of ancient branches swaying in the wind.

deep_forest_32.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_32.description: The deeper forest hums with the sounds of insects and unseen animals.
deep_forest_32.discovery_text: The trees grow larger and older as you press deeper into the forest.
deep_forest_32.ambient_text: The buzzing of insects creates a constant low hum.

deep_forest_33.name: Deep Forest
deep_forest_33.description: A fallen giant of a tree lies rotting, providing nutrients for new growth.
deep_forest_33.discovery_text: You push through a wall of ferns and find yourself deeper in the woods.
deep_forest_33.ambient_text: The buzzing of insects creates a constant low hum.

deep_forest_34.discovery_text: A carpet of bluebells stretches between the trees, glowing faintly in the dim light.
deep_forest_34.ambient_text: Water drips from a mossy rock nearby.

deep_forest_64.discovery_text: The shadows deepen as you venture further from the forest's edge.

open_hill_1.name: Open Hill
open_hill_1.description: From this rise you can see the forest canopy stretching to the horizon like a green sea.
open_hill_1.discovery_text: You climb the gentle slope and take in the view of the lands below.
open_hill_1.ambient_text: The wind blows softly across the grass, creating ripples like water.

open_hill_2.name: Open Hill
open_hill_2.description: The hill provides a panoramic view of the surrounding countryside.
open_hill_2.discovery_text: You ascend the rise, the grass swishing around your knees.
open_hill_2.ambient_text: The wind blows softly across the grass, creating ripples like water.

open_hill_3.name: Open Hill
open_hill_3.description: The hill provides a panoramic view of the surrounding countryside.
open_hill_3.discovery_text: The hill offers a vantage point over the surrounding wilderness.
open_hill_3.ambient_text: The wind blows softly across the grass, creating ripples like water.

open_hill_5.discovery_text: The hill offers a vantage point over the surrounding wilderness.
open_hill_5.ambient_text: Birds wheel overhead, riding the thermals.

open_hill_6.discovery_text: The hill offers a vantage point over the surrounding wilderness.
open_hill_6.ambient_text: The wind blows softly across the grass, creating ripples like water.

open_hill_8.discovery_text: You climb the gentle slope and take in the view of the lands below.
open_hill_8.ambient_text: Birds wheel overhead, riding the thermals.

open_hill_13.name: Open Hill
open_hill_13.description: The hill is covered in soft grass that waves in the breeze. Wildflowers dot the slope.
open_hill_13.discovery_text: You ascend the rise, the grass swishing around your knees.
open_hill_13.ambient_text: The wind blows softly across the grass, creating ripples like water.

farm_land_1.name: Farm Land
farm_land_1.description: Golden wheat sways in the breeze, stretching toward the horizon in orderly rows.
farm_land_1.discovery_text: You walk between the rows of crops, the earth soft beneath your feet.
farm_land_1.ambient_text: The rustle of crops in the wind is soothing.

farm_land_2.name: Farm Land
farm_land_2.description: The fields are a patchwork of green and gold. The air smells of earth and ripening grain.
farm_land_2.discovery_text: Fields of grain spread out before you, swaying in the breeze like a golden sea.
farm_land_2.ambient_text: Birds sing from a scarecrow standing guard nearby.

farm_land_3.name: Farm Land
farm_land_3.description: Hay bales dot the harvested sections of the field like forgotten sentinels.
farm_land_3.discovery_text: The cultivated fields of Oakhaven stretch before you, full of promise.
farm_land_3.ambient_text: The buzz of bees working among the blossoms fills the air.

farm_land_4.name: Farm Land
farm_land_4.description: Neat rows of crops stretch across the landscape, a testament to the farmer's craft.
farm_land_4.discovery_text: You walk between the rows of crops, the earth soft beneath your feet.
farm_land_4.ambient_text: Birds sing from a scarecrow standing guard nearby.

farm_land_5.name: Farm Land
farm_land_5.description: Tall corn stalks create a whispering maze of green. The sun warms the fertile soil.
farm_land_5.discovery_text: The cultivated fields of Oakhaven stretch before you, full of promise.
farm_land_5.ambient_text: The distant lowing of cattle carries on the breeze.

river_crossing_52.name: River Crossing
river_crossing_52.description: Tall reeds and cattails line the riverbank. Dragonflies hover over the still pools.
river_crossing_52.discovery_text: You emerge from the trees to find a river cutting through the landscape.
river_crossing_52.ambient_text: The sound of flowing water fills the air.

river_crossing_53.name: River Crossing
river_crossing_53.description: The river bends here, creating a calm pool on one side and a gentle rapid on the other.
river_crossing_53.discovery_text: You emerge from the trees to find a river cutting through the landscape.
river_crossing_53.ambient_text: A fish leaps from the water with a splash.

river_crossing_54.name: River Crossing
river_crossing_54.description: A shallow crossing allows passage over the river. The current is gentle here.
river_crossing_54.discovery_text: A clear river crosses your path, its waters glinting in the sunlight.
river_crossing_54.ambient_text: A fish leaps from the water with a splash.

river_crossing_55.name: River Crossing
river_crossing_55.description: The water sparkles in the sunlight as it flows over a bed of pebbles and sand.
river_crossing_55.discovery_text: The sound of flowing water grows louder as you approach the riverbank.
river_crossing_55.ambient_text: The sound of flowing water fills the air.

river_crossing_56.name: River Crossing
river_crossing_56.description: A shallow crossing allows passage over the river. The current is gentle here.
river_crossing_56.discovery_text: You emerge from the trees to find a river cutting through the landscape.
river_crossing_56.ambient_text: A fish leaps from the water with a splash.

dungeon_exterior.name: Dungeon Exterior
dungeon_exterior.description: The dark mouth of a dungeon gapes before you. A cold draft seeps from within.
dungeon_exterior.discovery_text: A gaping maw of stone opens into the earth. Cold air rises from below.
dungeon_exterior.ambient_text: Water drips somewhere inside the darkness.
